option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="ring" android:innerRadiusRatio="3" android:thicknessRatio="12" android:useLevel="false"> <size android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" /> <stroke android:width="3dp" android:color="@color/splash_loader" android:dashWidth="1dp" android:dashGap="4dp" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="ring" android:innerRadiusRatio="3" android:thicknessRatio="12" android:useLevel="false"> <size android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" /> <stroke android:width="3dp" android:color="@color/splash_loader" android:dashWidth="1dp" android:dashGap="4dp" /> </shape>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:background="@color/white">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/ic_launcher_background">
<!-- App Logo or Title --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="32sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" />
<!-- Loading Spinner --> <ProgressBar android:layout_width="60dp" android:layout_height="60dp" android:indeterminate="true" android:indeterminateTint="@color/white" />
<!-- Loading Text --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Loading..." android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/splash_background">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/logoGuide" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.47" />
<View android:id="@+id/outerRing" android:layout_width="184dp" android:layout_height="184dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_splash_ring_outer" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/logoGuide" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/logoGuide" />
<View android:id="@+id/innerRing" android:layout_width="130dp" android:layout_height="130dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_splash_ring_inner" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/outerRing" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/outerRing" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/outerRing" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/outerRing" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/logoCard" android:layout_width="84dp" android:layout_height="84dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="42dp" app:cardElevation="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/outerRing" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/outerRing" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/outerRing" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/outerRing">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="18dp" android:scaleType="fitCenter" android:src="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name" />
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/loadingIndicator" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/dotted_loader_static" android:contentDescription="@null" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/versionText" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" android:layout_marginBottom="14dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/versionText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="50dp" android:textColor="@color/splash_version" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_background">#ECECEC</color> <color name="splash_ring_outer">#EEF4FA</color> <color name="splash_ring_inner">#E4EEF7</color> <color name="splash_loader">#F1A000</color> <color name="splash_version">#AEB3B8</color> </resources>
